ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot carefully handling a safety pin, emphasizing precision and care. The movement will be slow and deliberate, focusing on the robot's interaction with the pin. Frame 1: Both arms are extended slightly forward, palms facing each other, ready to receive the safety pin. Frame 2: The right arm moves slightly forward, and the wrist rotates to grasp the safety pin. Frame 3: The right arm moves upward slightly, holding the safety pin securely. Frame 4: The left arm moves slightly forward to assist in placing the safety pin. Frame 5: Both arms return to their neutral resting position.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, ready to grasp the pin
right arm reaches, wrist twists to grip the pin
right arm lifts, holding the pin steady
left arm moves forward to help place the pin
both arms return to rest, pin secured
